title: Deez FPS [Vulkan Edition]
description: Are you lagging?? This ModPack got you!! What is lag after using this?

## **About**

Deez FPS is one of the best FPS modpacks you can find right now! this modpack version use [Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod )

•**Vulkan** is a Minecraft mod that replaces Minecraft's OpenGL renderer with an optimized renderer that uses **Vulkan API**.

### You Can find Deez FPS (the main modpack version) [Here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deez-fps )

<details>
    <summary>PC Config</summary>
  
- **Cpu: Ryzen 7 3700X.**
  
- **Gpu: RTX 2060.**
  
- **Ram: 16GB - DDR4.**
</details>

## **Compatibility**

Deez FPS [Vulkan Edition] is compatible with all the launchers, is still not official if it works with all but half of them.

## **FPS Comparison**

You can check the gallery I made, I tested some with vanilla, lunar client, fabulously optimized and deez fps [VE] of course **[ I didn't cheat, I didn't fake anything 100% reliable, It's not guarantee you will get the same fps like mine. I worked hard to use the same settings in vanilla , lunar , fo and mine, you can find my pc configuration in the gallery, I can't afford a better device, but for now I have a laptop, thinking to buy a pc soon enough. But with the modpack I made, you can play minecraft :). ]**

## **Shaders**

No, not for now, planned and might appear in the future

## **Connected Textures**

No, Deez FPS [Vulkan Edition] doesnot support connected textures and some optifine features.

## **Tweaks**

**Deez Fps** includes a few minor tweaks, such as [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix/version/1.10), [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper/version/v0.4.0-1.19.4), [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost/version/1.19.3-fabric0.68.1-1.1.5), [Smooth Boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric/version/1.19.4-1.7.0), [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky/version/1.3.74), [Mouse Tweaks
](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks/version/1.19.4-2.24-fabric ) etc....

## **Loader**

Built on Fabric is a lightweight, experimental modding tool chain for Minecraft.

## **Support**

If you need support or you have any question, you can join the discord, where there are mods and admins to assist you. Here is the link: [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/5QCXzTGKx5 )
